message:
feat(tui): add Projects + Contacts screens (V2 Phase 3)

Two new TUI screens expanding from 8 to 10 screens:
- Projects: sortable table with per-project agent/message/reservation counts,
  filter by slug/path, ProjectBySlug deep-link, truncated path display
- Contacts: sortable table with status filter cycling (All/Pending/Approved/Blocked),
  color-coded rows, ContactByPair deep-link, relative timestamp display

Data pipeline: DbPoller extended with LEFT JOIN aggregate queries for project
stats and contact resolution. SnapshotDelta tracks changes for both new lists.

Screen registry: MailScreenId extended, key 0 maps to 10th screen (Contacts),
palette action IDs added, deep-link routing updated.

33 new unit tests (16 projects + 17 contacts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
